text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The first half of February, huh. Okay.
Acute! What holiday does this time of year make
you think of?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Why, it makes me think of Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Valentine's Day?! Not Setsubun?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Setsubun's a way bigger deal, isn't it? You scatter
the beans and then everyone has inari sushi
together!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's the talk of the town right now,
though. I keep hearing everyone ask each other
who they're going to give their chocolates to.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see... I must've overlooked it. Valentine's Day,
huh? The day you give chocolate to someone
special...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it's February's main event, I'd better get
ready.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
According to feng shui, you have to use
handmade chocolate to really grab hold of
someone's heart. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna do it! Acute, help me out here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When you're trying to win someone's heart, what
do you think is most important?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Being heartfelt?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Close! That's definitely important, but I think the answer is using feng shui to maximize how sincere your feelings are! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Since ancient times, chocolate has been known to
have a calming effect.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So if I get them nice and relaxed and I use feng shui to boost my heartfelt feelings... they'll crumble, easy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In other words, if I set off in an auspicious
direction to buy the ingredients, then use pink
chocolate icing...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to capture Trainer's heart! This
Valentine's Day, the feng shui is going to be off
the charts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm gonna make the ultimate happy chocolate! ☆

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ultimate, hmm? Sounds like it'll pack quite the
punch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the fourteenth of February. After filling in
some racing documents, I set off to submit them,
when...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! I've got something nice for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey and Wonder Acute appear in
front of me. Given the date, could this be...
choice_data_list: Is it what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: It certainly is! I helped out myself, and the results were very scrumptious.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Go on then, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay! Um... Um... Um!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It's some inari sushi! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She abruptly hands me a platter of inari sushi.
choice_data_list: Inari sushi?! And a whole platter of it?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep! They say that when you eat inari sushi after
Setsubun, you'll feel overcome with happiness.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So eat up! ☆

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Um, Rickey? What happened to the chocolate we
made together?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Shh, shh! You don't have to bring that up, Acute!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Did something happen? Did it melt, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Nope, nope. It didn't melt or anything. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I really thought about it, I felt too embarrassed to
give Trainer chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I figured maybe it could wait, at least until my luck
improves a little more.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Bye, Trainer! Make sure you eat all that inari
sushi. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna go have some tea... to go with our
chocolate. See ya! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I'm suddenly left with an inari sushi platter. In all fairness though, it is good.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Morning, Trainer. It's finally... fiiinally done.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Here... Try this. It'll make a monumental
difference to your feng shui power. Your world
will never be the same again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's eyes are unusually serious. Not
to mention, today is Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the present to find just what I suspected:
some handmade chocolate. I take a bite, and...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? You're starting to get this
strange feeling in your chest, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Like you're getting in the mood to work really
hard for me? And devote your whole life to me?
That kinda mood?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Like your heart's turned a Rickey-kinda
color?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yay! Then it was a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's truly a feng shui Valentine's Day! ♪ No wall
around your heart is too tough for me to break
through!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But actually...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You mean, even before you ate the
chocolate?
choice_data_list: Yeah. You've always been my number one.
Yeah. You've always been my number one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm saying anything extraordinary.
Being a trainer is all about putting your racer's
future first.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh. I see. So I guess the chocolate had nothing to
do with it... No, more importantly—

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You can't just say I'm your number one so casually
like that! Especially when you don't usually say
that kinda stuff!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I mean, I gave you the chocolate, but now you've got me blushing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey seems very flustered all of a
sudden.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I guess you win, today. I can't believe the
chocolate didn't work. Still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next time, my feng shui will prove victorious! The
chocolate I'm gonna make will blow your socks
off!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You better brace yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day helps us realize that we don't
even need to rely on feng shui—our feelings are
already in sync.
